labels.1: Implement martial law in troubled regions
labels.3: Conduct joint exercises with allied nations
labels.5: Introduce mandatory military training in schools
labels.24: Promote tech hubs and innovation zones

1001.label: 24/7 Cemeteries Act
1001.description: The Ministry of Eternal Services proposes extending cemetery operating hours around the clock.
1001.accept: The cemeteries never close. Somehow, this is good for the economy.
1001.reject: You decline to regulate the dead.

1002.label: Mandatory Pigeon Hats
1002.description: The Bureau of Avian Fashion insists all city pigeons wear regulation hats.
1002.accept: Tiny hats are commissioned. The pigeons seem indifferent.

1003.label: Night Sun Initiative
1003.description: A second sun is proposed to increase business productivity after dark.
1003.accept: A second sun rises. Business booms. Sleep suffers.

1004.label: Reverse Funeral Program
1004.description: Citizens attend funerals in advance, as a form of gratitude for still being alive.
1004.accept: The people find it oddly moving. Morale improves.
1004.reject: You spare the living this awkward ritual.

1005.label: Skeleton Employment Act
1005.description: Skeletons are to be hired as unpaid municipal workers. No benefits required.
1005.accept: Skeletons report for duty. The treasury is grateful.

1006.label: Ministry of Additional Tuesdays
1006.description: The calendar is to be reformed to include a second Tuesday each week.
1006.accept: Productivity is up. Nobody likes Tuesdays more.
1006.reject: The week remains at seven days.

1007.label: National Giraffe Appreciation Act
1007.description: Giraffes are to be celebrated as a national symbol of perspective.
1007.accept: Giraffe appreciation day is declared. The people love it.
1007.reject: The giraffes receive no official recognition.

1008.label: Public Idling Initiative
1008.description: The military endorses mandatory public rest periods to conserve national energy.
1008.accept: Everyone stops moving simultaneously. The military approves.
1008.reject: Citizens are free to continue walking.

1009.label: Building Height Equality Act
1009.description: All buildings must be exactly the same height for reasons of architectural fairness.
1009.accept: Construction crews get to work evening things out.
1009.reject: Buildings remain at their natural, unequal heights.

1010.label: Department of Water Coolers
1010.description: A new ministry is created solely to manage the procurement of water coolers.
1010.accept: The department is founded. Water coolers appear everywhere.
1010.reject: The nation manages without a water cooler ministry.

1011.label: Mandatory Backwards Walking Friday
1011.description: Every Friday, all citizens must walk backwards for their morning commute.
1011.accept: Fridays are now significantly slower but more thoughtful.
1011.reject: Forwards walking remains the official direction.

1012.label: Ministry of Excessive Statues
1012.description: A ministry is established to fill every plaza with statues of questionable artistry.
1012.accept: The statues arrive. Your approval rating mysteriously rises.

1013.label: National Left-Handed Traffic Trial
1013.description: Vehicles are to switch to the left lane for a six-month trial period.
1013.accept: The military enforces the new lanes. Chaos is orderly.

1014.label: Legal Recognition of Ghosts
1014.description: A bill to grant ghosts full legal personhood and voting rights.
1014.accept: Ghosts are citizens now. Everyone seems fine with this.
1014.reject: Ghosts remain in a legal grey area.

acted_upon_law: You've already acted upon this law.
